description_long: This community center is a modern, angular building with a prominent two-story structure featuring a reddish-brown upper facade and a light blue lower section. Large rectangular windows line the upper floor, providing ample natural light, while the ground level includes multiple entry points and a geometric, sloped extension. The building is set on a spacious paved lot with a circular blue feature, possibly a decorative pool or plaza, and is accompanied by a cluster of stylized trees and a small auxiliary structure nearby. The main entrance appears to be accessible via a ramp, suggesting attention to accessibility. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms. The surrounding area is open, with clear pathways and landscaping elements that enhance the building's community-oriented function.
description: A modern, angular community center with a reddish-brown upper facade, blue lower section, large windows, and a sloped extension, set on a spacious paved lot with landscaping and a small auxiliary building.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reddish-brown facade, large windows, main entrance area, blue circular feature, and adjacent landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the elongated, angular shape, sloped extension, and the cluster of trees and auxiliary building to the left.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the building's length, geometric lines, and the open paved area with trees set further away.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the reddish-brown facade, main entrance, blue circular feature, and the arrangement of trees and auxiliary building to the right.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is visible at the front, featuring a wide, accessible ramp leading to a set of doors. The entrance is integrated into the lower blue section of the building, with large windows above and a geometric, sloped canopy. No steps or decorative elements are prominent, emphasizing accessibility and modern design.
attribute_accessibility_features: A wide ramp is present at the main entrance, providing accessible entry to the building.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary style with clean lines, geometric forms, flat roof, large windows, and minimal ornamentation.
